title: Residents of another World
overview:
High school girl "Florist Futaba" who wants "somewhere not here"  One day, suddenly, I am sucked into another world as I wish. In that world, it seems that people wearing clothes are stronger, She was called a "hero" by a naked boy who only wore golden pants. You will be asked for help.  And he is being chased by a killer.

Futaba tries to escape from the abnormal world, but at the moment when the blade of the killer is lowered, One of the shoes that was taken off turned into a handsome swordsman and stopped the pursuit of the killer.

title: Magic Spell
overview: Futaba-chan, who came to another dimension for three hours and met the fourth killer, summoned a new spiclo, but for some reason only the magic wand of the toy came out. It was related to Futaba-chan, Sako, and Liang Cho's promise when he was little.

title: Loyalty and Betrayal
overview: Since the name of the child in golden pants is "Hikari-kun," Futaba-chan has learned that people who meet in a different world are actually related to acquaintances in the real world. She is taken to Mitsu-kun's secret base, where she joins a little girl with the same name as her best friend Min-chan. We all decided to work together to fight the enemy, but there was a betrayal ...! ??

title: A World That Vanished
overview: Futaba-chan, who wants to stay together for a long time, requested Sako to study seriously. On the other hand, Sako asks Futaba to grant one wish instead. The wish was to elope from this town together with Futaba-chan.

title: Attack of the Darkness
overview: Hikari's mother begins to tell the truth that she had hidden to Futaba-chan, who came to hear about Sako. Previously, when Hikari's parents, Futaba's mother, and Liang Cho's father worked for the same pharmaceutical company, Hikari's father invented a drug that causes brain damage when taken in large amounts. It was being abused. Hikari's parents and Futaba's parents, who knew it, tried to stop selling the drug, but Liang Cho's father tried to hide what they said in order to protect himself.

title: Battle Against Overwhelming Odds
overview: Futaba-chan, who knew about Sako's circumstances, told Min-chan and Moe Moe the facts with the cooperation of his uncle (Hikari-kun). Min-chan and Moe Moe, who decided to awaken people's memories together, and Liang Cho, who heard the story, will also participate in the operation. However, Liang Cho's father who noticed it tries to get rid of them again.

title: What You Gave Me
overview: To reveal the truth of the case, Liang Cho leads his father (Liang Xin) to another place, while others go to the test site of an old factory in the basement of the school for evidence. .. However, the movement was also noticed by Liang Xin, and many of his subordinates lurking in the school attacked Futaba-chan and others. Sako appears in front of Futaba-chan, who has been forced into a difficult situation.

title: NICE
overview: Lin Ling finds himself filling the role of superhero Nice when he witnesses the unthinkable.

title: MOON
overview: Nice and Moon work together to live up to fans' expectations while devising a plan to regain their freedom.

title: The Ever-Standing Hero
overview: Nice (Lin Ling) aims to defeat the Ever-Standing Hero in order to rank up into the top ten.

title: The Commoner
overview: Nice (Lin Ling) faces off with God Eye to save Moon.

title: One Actor
overview: Yang Cheng, an E-Soul stage actor, struggles with gaining popularity while juggling work and romance.

title: Two E-Souls
overview: Yang Cheng gains public trust after footage of him saving Pomelo makes its way around social media.

title: Three Seats
overview: Yang Cheng seeks revenge for what happened to Shang Chao.

title: The Cyan Girl
overview: A girl who is luckier than usual survives a plane crash and is taken to an orphanage.

title: Loss and Gain
overview: After escaping the orphanage, Cyan is forced to fend for herself until she's presented with an opportunity.

title: The Truth Behind Luck
overview: After Cyan's departure, both the orphanage and its surroundings are plunged into bad luck.

title: Road to the Crown
overview: The young Liu Yuwei enters the top 10 rankings as the hero Queen and is on her way to becoming a top hero.

title: Fall of the Star
overview: Queen loses to an anonymous man in the hero tournament. The public begins to associate misfortune with Lucky.

title: Tough Girl
overview: Genius youth inventor Loli dreams of becoming a hero, but her looks prevent her from gaining Trust Value.

title: Impromptu Counterattack
overview: Loli and Nuonuo face previous top hero DJ Shindig who launched an assault on the Glimmer Laboratory.

title: Affective Disorder
overview: Ghostblade reflects on what led him to become a hero, and vows to fill a role he wasn't able to before.

title: The Cure
overview: Ghostblade uses the mission to get closer to Nuonuo, but danger lurks just around the corner.

title: Whisper Flower
overview: Little Johnny's past and his father's ties to other heroes is revealed.

title: Died-Out Flame
overview: Little Johnny becomes a young hero to find out the truth surrounding his father's death.

title: Breaking the Balance
overview: The exploration team prepares to enter the alien ship, but they are not the only ones.

title: The Ruins Incident
overview: Inside the spaceship there is a showdown between different camps.

title: Nurturing God
overview: Nice tries to keep his smile and Dragon Boy begins his mission.

title: The Last Smile
overview: Nice appears in the middle of Smile and Dragon's fight. But is he friend or foe?

title: Lie
overview: Ahu grew up in the circus and doesn't like children, but everything changes when he meets Xin Ya.

title: X
overview: The heroes go after X, Ahu discovers the truth and the tournament is about to begin.
